items.title: OpenAI will delay GPT-5.6 after Trump administration request
items.raw_content: The Trump administration, apprehensive of potential security issues, has reportedly asked OpenAI to stagger the release of its next big-ticket model, GPT-5.6. The Information reported that OpenAI CEO Sam Altman told employees Wednesday in a company Q&A that it would release GPT-5.6 in limited preview form - granting access only to a small group of […]

items.title: Anthropic’s Claude is winning over paid consumers, a market owned by ChatGPT
items.raw_content: Despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead, consumers who pay for AI have been increasingly choosing Anthropic's Claude, data shows.
items.summary: Despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead, consumers who pay for AI have been increasingly choosing Anthropic's Claude, data shows.

items.title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
items.raw_content: OpenAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of with the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.
items.summary: OpenAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of with the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.

items.title: General Intuition’s $2.3B bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
items.raw_content: General Intuition has raised $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting action data can help AI develop something closer to human intuition.
items.summary: General Intuition has raised $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting action data can help AI develop something closer to human intuition.

items.title: Netris raises $15M Series A from a16z to help AI neoclouds go live faster
items.raw_content: Netris provides software that runs on network switches, and offers a platform that helps neocloud operators reduce the time it takes to go live.
items.summary: Netris provides software that runs on network switches, and offers a platform that helps neocloud operators reduce the time it takes to go live.

items.title: Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents
items.raw_content: Agent-testing startup Patronus AI, founded by former Meta AI researchers, is experiencing nearly insatiable demand, its investor says.
items.summary: Agent-testing startup Patronus AI, founded by former Meta AI researchers, is experiencing nearly insatiable demand, its investor says.

items.title: Databricks’ former AI chief thinks he can cut AI’s power bill by 1,000x
items.raw_content: Un-0 is an image-generation system tool that shows for the first time how the company's technology can replicate conventional AI systems.
items.summary: Un-0 is an image-generation system tool that shows for the first time how the company's technology can replicate conventional AI systems.

items.title: Adobe acquires image and video enhancement tool maker Topaz Labs
items.raw_content: Adobe said that it will integrate Topaz Labs' tools across its apps.
items.summary: Adobe said that it will integrate Topaz Labs' tools across its apps.

items.title: Amazon ups India bet with fresh $13B AI infrastructure investment
items.raw_content: Amazon’s latest India investment comes as global tech companies race to expand AI infrastructure in the country.
items.summary: Amazon’s latest India investment comes as global tech companies race to expand AI infrastructure in the country.

items.title: Ford had to hire back former engineers to fix mistakes made by its automated systems
items.raw_content: To celebrate its new status as No. 1 in JD Power's initial quality ranking among mainstream automakers, Ford is opening up about the challenges it has faced in recent years, especially around its reliance on automated systems in production and design. items.title: Facebook’s Creator Studio has been revived as an AI companion app
items.raw_content: Meta is bringing back the Facebook Creator Studio page manager, now "reimagined" as a standalone AI companion app. The new app aims to make it easier for creators to connect with their audiences and show them "exactly how to grow on Facebook," according to Meta's announcement. items.title: OpenAI reveals its first AI processor: Jalapeño
items.raw_content: OpenAI has just revealed a new "intelligence processor" chip for AI servers made in partnership with Broadcom. The chip, called Jalapeño, is designed to power current and future large language models, according to an announcement on Wednesday. Jalapeño is an ASIC (Application-Specific Integrated Circuit), meaning it's designed for a specific purpose: AI inference. With AI […]

items.title: Congresswoman denies staff used AI to write defense funding amendment
items.raw_content: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna (R-FL) says her staff used AI for "spellcheck" in an amendment summary for a major defense bill, but denies it was used for the bill text itself and says "NO Legislation is ever drafted with AI." items.title: Google Home will soon get better at recognizing you
items.raw_content: A new update for Google Home could make it less likely your smart home cameras mistake you for someone else, just because you're facing away from the camera.
